content_text: After a year of work, our engineering team has migrated the entire authentication stack from custom code to a managed identity provider. The migration involved deprecating three legacy services, retiring 40,000 lines of code, and standardizing on OpenID Connect across all clients.

We are deprecating the v1 Reports API on July 1, 2027. Customers using it should migrate to the v3 endpoints, which support the same functionality plus pagination and async exports. A migration guide is available in the developer portal.

Today's incident postmortem: a deployment automation script paused mid-run due to a transient credential expiry, leaving the cluster in a partial-update state for 23 minutes. The fix landed within the hour; we're rolling out short-lived credential refresh as a hardening measure.
